meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST — ESPECIALLY NOT TIME ESTIMATES. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.
sourceDocuments: scratch/bubbletea-v2-migration.md — Original v2-first migration plan (7 phases, zero shims mandate)
scratch/migration-guide.md — Official Bubble Tea v2 upgrade guide
scratch/termmux-architecture.md — SessionManager architecture and implementation notes

globalAlerts.warning: ALL checks must pass on ALL platforms (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest). Never accept failing or flaky tests.
GNU Make is the build system. Use make test, make lint, make build. On macOS use gmake.
ZERO COMPATIBILITY SHIMS: v2 ONLY. No v1 mouse patterns (isWheel, action, shift/alt/ctrl booleans). v2 uses type-based dispatch and msg.mod array.
BRIDGE SYMMETRY: msgToJS and JsToTeaMsg MUST agree on event shapes. Asymmetric bridges are defective.

statusSection.currentState: MERGE COMPLETE. Branch one-shot-man-3 merged with wip. All v2 migration Done. All SessionManager/termmux tasks from wip Done. Post-merge cleanup in progress.
statusSection.goalState: Production-ready merged codebase: zero v1 patterns, all tests green on 3 platforms, complete documentation, then STUB tasks and future features.
replanLog: 2026-04-11: MERGE SESSION. Merged wip (81 commits) into one-shot-man-3 (23 commits). Resolved 8 file conflicts. Unified blueprint.json.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: Each task covers one cohesive change. Read relevant source files before each task.
mandatoryDirectives.shimProhibition: If any task introduces or preserves a v1 compatibility shim, STOP and replan.
mandatoryDirectives.noShimPeriods: There is NO transitional period where both v1 and v2 behaviors coexist.

sequentialTasks.description: Run make build && make lint && make test-short. Verify no conflict markers remain.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: make build, make lint, make test-short all exit 0. grep -rn '<<<<<<<' returns zero hits.

sequentialTasks.task: Sweep wip-introduced JS for remaining v1 mouse patterns
sequentialTasks.description: Scan ALL .js files for: msg.isWheel, msg.action, msg.shift/alt/ctrl booleans, msg.row/msg.col. Convert to v2.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Zero v1 mouse patterns in any JS file under internal/command/.

sequentialTasks.description: Run full make test. Fix failures from merge resolution, v1 patterns in wip code, golden file mismatches.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: make test exits 0, all packages pass.

sequentialTasks.description: Update golden files for changed tab bar structure and lipgloss v2 rendering.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All golden file tests pass.

sequentialTasks.task: Commit merge with Rule of Two verification
sequentialTasks.description: Stage all files. Two contiguous issue-free subagent reviews.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Merge committed after Rule of Two gate passes.

sequentialTasks.description: gmake test with 30m timeout. All packages pass including slow E2E.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: gmake test exits 0 on macOS.

sequentialTasks.description: make make-all-in-container.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Exits 0, all tests pass on Linux.

sequentialTasks.description: make make-all-run-windows.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Exits 0, all tests pass on Windows.

sequentialTasks.description: Verify all docs/ accuracy. No stale v1 refs, deleted types, or pre-merge APIs.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All docs accurate for current v2 API.

sequentialTasks.description: Review every change vs main. All intentional, tested, documented.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Complete audit. No dead code. All changes covered by tests.

sequentialTasks.task: Adversarial codebase autopsy on merged state
sequentialTasks.description: Subagent with adversarial-codebase-autopsy skill verifies merged codebase.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Autopsy report produced. All issues addressed.

sequentialTasks.description: Expose cursor position/shape/color/blink via view() return.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: JS controls cursor via view(). Integration test verifies.

sequentialTasks.description: Expose terminal-wide colors via view() return.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: JS sets terminal colors. Integration test verifies.

sequentialTasks.description: Expose Kitty keyboard protocol via view() return.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: JS requests keyboard enhancements. Integration test verifies.

sequentialTasks.description: Expose zone-based mouse interception via view() return.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: JS defines mouse zones. Tests verify detection.

sequentialTasks.description: Expose native terminal progress bars.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: JS displays progress bars. Integration test verifies.

sequentialTasks.description: Expose bracketed paste control.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: JS controls bracketed paste. Test verifies.

sequentialTasks.description: Benchmark message throughput, view parsing, render latency.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Benchmark suite runs. Results documented.

sequentialTasks.description: Design JS API, create skeleton, implement pane CRUD/visibility/events/bubbletea integration, tests.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All facade functions tested. make all + integration targets pass.

sequentialTasks.description: Design states, implement transitions, port plan editor, branch pipeline, error resolution, orchestration, remove old Go TUI, E2E tests.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Full wizard E2E. Old Go TUI removed. All tests pass.

sequentialTasks.description: Bell interception, HUD, mouse in termmux, native IPC, worktree isolation, error handling.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All features implemented and tested.

sequentialTasks.description: Run all targets on all platforms.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All GREEN on macOS, Linux, Windows.

sequentialTasks.description: Identify next improvements. Task list never empty.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: New tasks added.

continuousVerification.task: Run build and test after EVERY significant change
continuousVerification.failPolicy: If ANY test fails, STOP IMMEDIATELY and fix before proceeding.

finalEnforcementProtocol.alert: ZERO COMPATIBILITY SHIMS — v2 type-based dispatch ONLY. msg.mod array. msg.x/msg.y coordinates.
ALL platforms must pass. Cross-platform testing mandatory.
